channel.title: Daily News (Personal Briefing)
channel.description: A personal morning news briefing covering AI, marketing, higher education, Canadian policy, BC local news, and global business.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News

item.title: Daily News for Sunday, May 10, 2026
item.description: Three threads converge for you this Sunday, Midya. The hantavirus outbreak on a cruise ship — with Canadians aboard — is escalating in a way that warrants attention, especially given STAT News is flagging the CDC's unusual absence. On the higher-ed front, the Conestoga College sp...
